2023-24 Wyoming Cowboys Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 15-17 (8-10, 8th in MWC MBB)

Coach: Jeff Linder

PS/G: 72.8 (196th of 362)

PA/G: 74.5 (261st of 362)

SRS: 0.54 (143rd of 362)

SOS: 4.57 (91st of 362)

ORtg: 106.4 (171st of 362)

DRtg: 108.8 (311th of 362)

Preseason Odds: Championship +50000
